Base Path

Set this when Stillwater lives at a sub-path (for example /stillwater) behind a reverse proxy rather than at the domain root. Must start with a slash and not end with one. Stillwater needs a restart for changes to take effect. Read more →

URL path prefix for running Stillwater behind a reverse proxy at a sub-path.

Currently set by the SW_BASE_PATH environment variable. The environment variable takes precedence over any value saved here.
